global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with a clear focus on food delivery services.
global.main_message: Promoting food delivery with an emphasis on freshness and convenience.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: FreshDash logo
elements.description: A simple, modern logo featuring the text 'FreshDash' in a bold font, set against a light green background.

elements.label: Decorative icons
elements.description: Two stylized icons resembling food containers, outlined in white, positioned centrally on a light green background.

elements.label: Decorative icons
elements.description: Another stylized icon resembling a food container, outlined in white, positioned slightly below the first two icons.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Bold, black text stating 'Your cravings, delivered' with a smaller subtitle 'Fresh favorites nearby' in a lighter font, set against a light green background.
elements.text_content: Your cravings, delivered Fresh favorites nearby €19.99 Watch now

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Watch now' in white, set against a dark green background, positioned at the bottom of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, bright and modern, FreshDash logo, food delivery message
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, decorative icons are centered, the main message text is below, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: FreshDash, Your cravings, delivered, Fresh favorites nearby, €19.99, Watch now
